testcase.name: ui_smoke.strict_ui

failure.message: test driver did not become ready in time

testcase.failure: {"runtimeErrors": ["SCRIPT ERROR: Parse Error: Unexpected \"?\" in source. If you want a ternary operator, use \"truthy_value if true_condition else falsy_value\".", "ERROR: Failed to load script \"res://scripts/test/test_driver.gd\" with error \"Parse error\".", "ERROR: Failed to instantiate an autoload, script 'res://scripts/test/test_driver.gd' does not inherit from 'Node'."], "flowAssertions": {"total": 0, "passed": 0, "failed": 0}}
